properties.name: MI Security
properties.description: 3-piece set effect: Wearer's Critical Rate +{crit_up:0%}. After the wearer scores a critical hit, the wearer gains ATK +{atk_up:0%} for {duration}s. This effect can reach {max_stack:0} stacks. At max stacks, grant an additional Critical Rate +{crit_up2:0%}. This effect cannot stack.
